name: football-coaching-app
description: A cross-platform mobile-first fitness coaching app for youth football athletes, their parents, and a coach-admin dashboard.   - **Mobile App:** iOS & Android (React Native / Expo)   - **Admin Dashboard:** Web-based (Next.js)   - **Backend:** Express + TypeScript API

scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:e2e
